query: What should I name the skill repo for working with EspoCRM, and what should I call its two auth paths?
expected_behavior: Repo name: espocrm-skills (the <app>-skills pattern, official product-name token)
Do NOT name the auth paths after EspoCRM's own user types — admin/super-admin collide with real EspoCRM types and invert the mapping
Name by what authenticates: api-user path / admin path
notes: Tests the naming convention plus the don't-collide-with-the-platform's-own-vocabulary rule.
